duas.bangla: বিসমিল্লাহির রাহমানির রাহিম
duas.transliteration: Bismillahir Rahmanir Rahim
duas.translation: In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful

duas.bangla: সুবহানাল্লাহি ওয়া বিহামদিহি
duas.transliteration: Subhanallahi wa bihamdihi
duas.translation: Glory be to Allah and praise be to Him

duas.bangla: আল্লাহুম্মা আহদিনা ফিমান হাদাইত
duas.transliteration: Allahumma ahidina fiman hadait
duas.translation: O Allah, guide us among those You have guided

duas.bangla: রাব্বানা আতিনা ফিদ দুনিয়া হাসানা
duas.transliteration: Rabbana atina fid-dunya hasanah
duas.translation: Our Lord, give us good in this world and good in the Hereafter

duas.bangla: আল্লাহুম্মা ইন্নি আস'আলুকাল আফিয়া
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni as'aluka al-afia
duas.translation: O Allah, I ask You for good health

duas.bangla: লা ইলাহা ইল্লাল্লাহু মুহাম্মাদুর রাসুলুল্লাহ
duas.transliteration: La ilaha illallah, Muhammadur Rasulullah
duas.translation: There is no god but Allah, and Muhammad is the Messenger of Allah

duas.bangla: সালাতু আলান নাবী
duas.transliteration: Salatu alan-Nabi
duas.translation: Peace and blessings be upon the Prophet

duas.bangla: আল্লাহুম্মা আগফিরলি জুনুবি ওয়ারহামনি
duas.transliteration: Allahumma aghfir li junubi warhamni
duas.translation: O Allah, forgive my sins and have mercy on me

duas.bangla: اللهم اكفني بحلالك عن حرامك
duas.transliteration: Allahumma ikfini bihalalika 'an haramika
duas.translation: O Allah, suffice me with what You have permitted instead of what You have forbidden

duas.bangla: اللهم ارزقني رزقا حلالا طيبا
duas.transliteration: Allahumma arzuqni rizqan halal-an tayyiban
duas.translation: O Allah, grant me lawful and good provision

duas.bangla: اللهم إني أعوذ بك من الفقر
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni a'udhu bika min al-faqr
duas.translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from poverty

duas.bangla: اللهم افتح لي أبواب رزقك
duas.transliteration: Allahumma iftah li abwaba rizqik
duas.translation: O Allah, open for me the doors of Your provision

duas.bangla: اللهم ارزقني من حيث لا أحتسب
duas.transliteration: Allahumma arzuqni min haythu la ahtasib
duas.translation: O Allah, provide for me from where I do not expect

duas.bangla: اللهم لا تحرمني رزقك
duas.transliteration: Allahumma la tuhrimni rizqak
duas.translation: O Allah, do not deprive me of Your provision

duas.bangla: اللهم اغنني بحلالك عن حرامك وبفضلك عمن سواك
duas.transliteration: Allahumma aghnini bihalalika 'an haramika wa bifadlika 'amman siwak
duas.translation: O Allah, enrich me with Your lawful provisions and by Your grace keep me independent of others

duas.bangla: سبحان الله وبحمده سبحان الله العظيم
duas.transliteration: SubhanAllahi wa bihamdihi, SubhanAllahi al-‘Azim
duas.translation: Glory and praise be to Allah, glory to Allah the Almighty

duas.bangla: رب اشرح لي صدري ويسر لي أمري
duas.transliteration: Rabbi ishrah li sadri wa yassir li amri
duas.translation: My Lord, expand for me my breast and ease my task for me

duas.bangla: رب زدني علما
duas.transliteration: Rabbi zidni 'ilma
duas.translation: My Lord, increase me in knowledge

duas.bangla: اللهم إني أسألك علما نافعا
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni as'aluka 'ilman nafi'an
duas.translation: O Allah, I ask You for beneficial knowledge

duas.bangla: اللهم علمنا ما ينفعنا وانفعنا بما علمتنا
duas.transliteration: Allahumma 'allimna ma yanfa'una wa anfa'na bima 'allamtana
duas.translation: O Allah, teach us what benefits us and benefit us by what You have taught us

duas.bangla: اللهم إني أعوذ بك من الجوع والحرمان
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni a'udhu bika min al-ju'i wal-hirman
duas.translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from hunger and deprivation

duas.bangla: اللهم وفّر لي رزقا واسعًا
duas.transliteration: Allahumma waffir li rizqan wasi'an
duas.translation: O Allah, grant me abundant and wide provision

duas.bangla: اللهم افتح علي خزائن رحمتك
duas.transliteration: Allahumma iftah 'alayya khaza'in rahmatik
duas.translation: O Allah, open for me the treasures of Your mercy

duas.bangla: يا واسع الرزق ارزقني وبالبركة
duas.transliteration: Ya Wasi' ar-rizq, arzuqni wa bil-barakah
duas.translation: O Expander of provision, grant me sustenance with blessing

duas.bangla: اللهم اجعل رزقي حلالًا مباركًا
duas.transliteration: Allahumma ij'al rizqi halal-an mubarak-an
duas.translation: O Allah, make my provision lawful and blessed

duas.bangla: اللهم ارزقني الصبر والاعتماد عليك
duas.transliteration: Allahumma arzuqni as-sabr wa al-i'timad 'alayk
duas.translation: O Allah, grant me patience and reliance upon You

duas.bangla: حسبي الله ونعم الوكيل
duas.transliteration: Hasbiyallahu wa ni'mal wakeel
duas.translation: Allah is sufficient for me, and He is the best disposer of affairs

duas.bangla: اللهم أعطني قوة على طاعتك
duas.transliteration: Allahumma a'tini quwwatan 'ala ta'atik
duas.translation: O Allah, give me strength to obey You

duas.bangla: يا مقلب القلوب ثبت قلبي على دينك
duas.transliteration: Ya Muqallib al-qulub, thabbit qalbi 'ala dinik
duas.translation: O Turner of the hearts, make my heart firm upon Your religion

duas.bangla: اللهم ارزقني علما نافعًا وعملًا متقبلًا
duas.transliteration: Allahumma arzuqni 'ilman nafi'an wa 'amalan mutaqabbalan
duas.translation: O Allah, grant me beneficial knowledge and accepted deeds

duas.bangla: اللهم اهدني لعمل الرزق الحلال
duas.transliteration: Allahumma ihdini li'amal ar-rizq al-halal
duas.translation: O Allah, guide me to work that brings lawful provision

duas.bangla: اللهم اكفني فقر الدنيا والآخرة
duas.transliteration: Allahumma ikfini faqra ad-dunya wal-akhirah
duas.translation: O Allah, shield me from poverty in this world and the Hereafter

duas.bangla: اللهم زدني قوة في قلبي وجسدي
duas.transliteration: Allahumma zidni quwwah fi qalbi wa jasadi
duas.translation: O Allah, increase my strength in heart and body

duas.bangla: اللهم علمني ما ينفعني وانفعني بما علمتني
duas.transliteration: Allahumma 'allimni ma yanfa'uni wa anfa'ni bima 'allamtani
duas.translation: O Allah, teach me what benefits me and benefit me by what You have taught me

duas.bangla: رب ارحمني ووسع علي رزقي
duas.transliteration: Rabbi irhamni wa wassi' 'alayya rizqi
duas.translation: My Lord, have mercy on me and expand my provision

duas.bangla: اللهم اجعلني من الذين يستمعون القول فيتبعون أحسنه
duas.transliteration: Allahumma ij'alni min alladhina yastami'una al-qawla fayattabi'una ahsanahu
duas.translation: O Allah, make me of those who listen to the best of speech and follow it

duas.bangla: اللهم إني أعوذ بك من همزات الشياطين
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni a'udhu bika min hamazat ash-shayatin
duas.translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from the whisperings of the devils

duas.bangla: اللهم إني أسألك قلبًا خاشعًا وعلما نافعًا
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni as'aluka qalban khashi'an wa 'ilman nafi'an
duas.translation: O Allah, I ask You for a humble heart and beneficial knowledge

duas.bangla: يا رب ارزقني حلالا طيبا وبارك لي فيه
duas.transliteration: Ya Rabb, arzuqni halal-an tayyiban wa barik li fihi
duas.translation: My Lord, grant me lawful, good provision and bless it for me

duas.bangla: اللهم أعني على ذكرك وشكرك وحسن عبادتك
duas.transliteration: Allahumma a'inni 'ala dhikrika wa shukrika wa husni 'ibadatika
duas.translation: O Allah, help me remember You, thank You, and worship You well

duas.bangla: اللهم اجعل العلم نورًا في قلبي
duas.transliteration: Allahumma ij'al al-'ilma nuran fi qalbi
duas.translation: O Allah, make knowledge a light in my heart

duas.bangla: اللهم افتح علي باب رزق واسع
duas.transliteration: Allahumma iftah 'alayya baban rizq wasi'an
duas.translation: O Allah, open for me a door of wide provision

duas.bangla: اللهم ارزقني حبك وحب من يحبك
duas.transliteration: Allahumma arzuqni hubbaka wa hubba man yuhibbuk
duas.translation: O Allah, grant me Your love and the love of those who love You

duas.bangla: اللهم أجرني من الفقر والذل
duas.transliteration: Allahumma ajirni min al-faqr wal-dhill
duas.translation: O Allah, save me from poverty and humiliation

duas.bangla: اللهم اجعل عملي خالصًا لوجهك وزدني علما
duas.transliteration: Allahumma ij'al 'amali khalisan li wajhika wa zidni 'ilman
duas.translation: O Allah, make my deeds sincere for Your sake and increase me in knowledge

duas.bangla: اللهم ارزقني حكمة ورحمة في قلبي
duas.transliteration: Allahumma arzuqni hikmah wa rahmah fi qalbi
duas.translation: O Allah, grant me wisdom and mercy in my heart

duas.bangla: اللهم اغنني عن الناس بعلمك وفضلك
duas.transliteration: Allahumma aghnini 'an an-nas bi'ilmika wa fadhlika
duas.translation: O Allah, make me independent of people through Your knowledge and bounty

duas.bangla: اللهم اني اسألك الثبات والقوة في الامتحان
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni as'aluka ath-thabata wal-quwwata fi al-imtihan
duas.translation: O Allah, I ask You for steadfastness and strength in trials

duas.bangla: اللهم اجعل رزقي ممن عندك ولا تجعلني ممن تظلمهم
duas.transliteration: Allahumma ij'al rizqi mimman 'indaka wa la taj'alni mimman tazlimuhum
duas.translation: O Allah, make my provision from with You and do not make me among those who are wronged

duas.bangla: اللهم علمني ما ينفعني وزدني علماً نافعا
duas.transliteration: Allahumma 'allimni ma yanfa'uni wa zidni 'ilman nafi'an
duas.translation: O Allah, teach me what benefits me and increase me in beneficial knowledge

duas.bangla: يا ودود يا رزاق ارزقني من فضلك
duas.transliteration: Ya Wadud, Ya Razzaq, arzuqni min fadlika
duas.translation: O Loving One, O Provider, grant me from Your bounty

duas.bangla: اللهم جنبني الفقر وابعد عني الحاجة
duas.transliteration: Allahumma janbibni al-faqr wa ab'id 'anni al-hajah
duas.translation: O Allah, keep me away from poverty and remove neediness from me

duas.bangla: اللهم ارزقني رزقا مباركا وباركه لي
duas.transliteration: Allahumma arzuqni rizqan mubarak-an wa barik li fihi
duas.translation: O Allah, grant me blessed provision and bless it for me

duas.bangla: اللهم اجعلني من القويين في مرضاتك
duas.transliteration: Allahumma ij'alni min al-qawiyyin fi mardatik
duas.translation: O Allah, make me among the strong ones in seeking Your pleasure

duas.bangla: اللهم علمنا ما ينفعنا في ديننا ودنيانا
duas.transliteration: Allahumma 'allimna ma yanfa'unna fi dinina wa dunyana
duas.translation: O Allah, teach us what benefits us in our religion and worldly life

duas.bangla: اللهم ارزقني عملًا يدر رزقًا حلالًا
duas.transliteration: Allahumma arzuqni 'amalan yudurru rizqan halal-an
duas.translation: O Allah, provide me with work that brings lawful sustenance

duas.bangla: اللهم افتح على قلبي باب الثقة والقوة
duas.transliteration: Allahumma iftah 'ala qalbi bab ath-thiqa wal-quwwa
duas.translation: O Allah, open in my heart the door of confidence and strength

duas.bangla: اللهم أشرح صدري وأزل همي
duas.transliteration: Allahumma ishrah sadri wa azil hammi
duas.translation: O Allah, expand my chest and remove my worry

duas.bangla: اللهم اجعلني ذا حكمة وفهم
duas.transliteration: Allahumma ij'alni dha hikmah wa fahm
duas.translation: O Allah, make me one of understanding and wisdom

duas.bangla: اللهم ارزقني علماً أعمل به
duas.transliteration: Allahumma arzuqni 'ilman a'malu bihi
duas.translation: O Allah, grant me knowledge which I act upon

duas.bangla: اللهم اغنني بفضلك عن خلقك
duas.transliteration: Allahumma aghnini bifadlika 'an khalqik
duas.translation: O Allah, enrich me by Your grace and make me independent of people

duas.bangla: يا معين أعنّي على سعي الرزق
duas.transliteration: Ya Mu'in, a'inni 'ala sa'yi ar-rizq
duas.translation: O Helper, assist me in striving for provision

duas.bangla: اللهم اهدني لسبل الرزق الحلال
duas.transliteration: Allahumma ihdini lisubul ar-rizq al-halal
duas.translation: O Allah, guide me to the ways of lawful provision

duas.bangla: اللهم ارزقني قوة الإرادة والصبر
duas.transliteration: Allahumma arzuqni quwwat al-irada wa as-sabr
duas.translation: O Allah, grant me willpower and patience

duas.bangla: اللهم افتح علي باب الفهم والذكاء
duas.transliteration: Allahumma iftah 'alayya bab al-fahm wa adh-dhaka'
duas.translation: O Allah, open for me the door of understanding and intelligence

duas.bangla: اللهم اجعل عملي سببًا لزيادة رزقي
duas.transliteration: Allahumma ij'al 'amali sabab-an liziadat rizqi
duas.translation: O Allah, make my work a cause for increasing my provision

duas.bangla: اللهم قوتي في طاعتك ورضاك
duas.transliteration: Allahumma quwwati fi ta'atika wa ridaak
duas.translation: O Allah, my strength is in Your obedience and pleasure

duas.bangla: اللهم أنر بصيرتي وزدني علما وفهما
duas.transliteration: Allahumma anir basirati wa zidni 'ilman wa fahman
duas.translation: O Allah, illuminate my insight and increase me in knowledge and understanding

duas.bangla: اللهم ارزقني بركة في مالي ووقتي
duas.transliteration: Allahumma arzuqni barakah fi mali wa waqti
duas.translation: O Allah, grant me blessing in my wealth and time

duas.bangla: اللهم اجعلني قويًا على مغريات الدنيا
duas.transliteration: Allahumma ij'alni qawiyan 'ala mughriyyat ad-dunya
duas.translation: O Allah, make me strong against the temptations of this world

duas.bangla: اللهم أسألك فهم النبيين وحفظ المرسلين
duas.transliteration: Allahumma as'aluka fahma an-nabiyyin wa hifza al-mursalin
duas.translation: O Allah, I ask You for the understanding of the prophets and the preservation of the messengers

duas.bangla: رب ارحمني واجعل لي مخرجًا ورزقًا من حيث لا أحتسب
duas.transliteration: Rabbi irhamni waj'al li makhrajan wa rizqan min haythu la ahtasib
duas.translation: My Lord, have mercy on me and make for me a way out and provision from where I do not expect

duas.bangla: اللهم ارزقني الصحبة الصالحة والمساعدة على الخير
duas.transliteration: Allahumma arzuqni as-suhbah as-salihah wa al-musa'adah 'ala al-khair
duas.translation: O Allah, grant me righteous companionship and help to do good

duas.bangla: اللهم أعطني قلبًا مطمئنًا وقوة في العمل
duas.transliteration: Allahumma a'tini qalban mutma'innan wa quwwah fi al-'amal
duas.translation: O Allah, give me a contented heart and strength in action

duas.bangla: اللهم اجعلني ممن يستظلون بظل علمك
duas.transliteration: Allahumma ij'alni mimman yastadhilluna bi dhill 'ilmik
duas.translation: O Allah, make me among those who are shaded by the shade of Your knowledge

duas.bangla: اللهم أخرجني من ضيق الرزق إلى سعة
duas.transliteration: Allahumma akhrijni min dayq ar-rizq ila si'ah
duas.translation: O Allah, take me out of the tightness of provision into abundance

duas.bangla: اللهم اجعلني قويًا في إيماني وعملي
duas.transliteration: Allahumma ij'alni qawiyan fi imani wa 'amali
duas.translation: O Allah, make me strong in my faith and deeds

duas.bangla: اللهم علمني ما جهلت وأذكرني ما نسيت
duas.transliteration: Allahumma 'allimni ma jahlatu wa adhkurni ma naseetu
duas.translation: O Allah, teach me what I have been ignorant of and remind me of what I have forgotten

duas.bangla: اللهم ارزقني البصيرة والتوفيق في سعيي
duas.transliteration: Allahumma arzuqni al-basirah wa at-tawfiq fi sa'yi
duas.translation: O Allah, grant me insight and success in my striving

duas.bangla: اللهم اجعلني من الذين يقيمون الصلاة ويؤتون الزكاة
duas.transliteration: Allahumma ij'alni min alladhina yuqimuna as-salata wa yutuna az-zakata
duas.translation: O Allah, make me among those who establish prayer and give zakat

duas.bangla: اللهم إني أستودعك مالي وعملي فبارك فيهما
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni astawdi'uka mali wa 'amali fabarik fihima
duas.translation: O Allah, I entrust to You my wealth and my deeds, so bless them

duas.bangla: اللهم ارزقني فهم القرآن والعمل به
duas.transliteration: Allahumma arzuqni fahma al-Qur'an wa al-'amal bihi
duas.translation: O Allah, grant me understanding of the Qur'an and the ability to act upon it

duas.bangla: اللهم اجعل قلبي قويًا بالإيمان
duas.transliteration: Allahumma ij'al qalbi qawiyan bil-iman
duas.translation: O Allah, make my heart strong with faith

duas.bangla: اللهم ارزقني وسيلة من عندك لتيسير رزقي
duas.transliteration: Allahumma arzuqni wasilah min 'indika litasir rizqi
duas.translation: O Allah, grant me a means from You to ease my provision

duas.bangla: اللهم اجعل عملي خالصًا ونافعًا
duas.transliteration: Allahumma ij'al 'amali khalisan wa nafian
duas.translation: O Allah, make my deed sincere and beneficial

duas.bangla: اللهم إني أعوذ بك من الكسل والهرم والجبن والبخل
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni a'udhu bika min al-kasali wal-haram wal-jubni wal-bukhl
duas.translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from laziness, old age, cowardice and miserliness

duas.bangla: اللهم علمنا ما ينفعنا واجعلنا من ورثة العلم
duas.transliteration: Allahumma 'allimna ma yanfa'una waj'alna min warathat al-'ilm
duas.translation: O Allah, teach us what benefits us and make us inheritors of knowledge

duas.bangla: اللهم اجعل رزقي من أوسع أبواب رحمتك
duas.transliteration: Allahumma ij'al rizqi min awsa' abwab rahmatik
duas.translation: O Allah, make my provision from the widest doors of Your mercy

duas.bangla: اللهم أعني على قضاء حوائجي وقوتي
duas.transliteration: Allahumma a'inni 'ala qada' hawa'iji wa quwati
duas.translation: O Allah, help me to fulfill my needs and grant me strength

duas.bangla: اللهم ارزقني الهداية والتوفيق في تعلّم العلم
duas.transliteration: Allahumma arzuqni al-hidaya wa at-tawfiq fi ta'allum al-'ilm
duas.translation: O Allah, grant me guidance and success in learning knowledge

duas.bangla: اللهم افتح علي فتوح العلم ورحمة الفهم
duas.transliteration: Allahumma iftah 'alayya futuh al-'ilm wa rahmat al-fahm
duas.translation: O Allah, open for me openings of knowledge and the mercy of understanding

duas.bangla: اللهم اجعل رزقي ثابتًا وواسعًا
duas.transliteration: Allahumma ij'al rizqi thabitan wa wasi'an
duas.translation: O Allah, make my provision steady and ample

duas.bangla: اللهم زدني قوة على الطاعة والصبر
duas.transliteration: Allahumma zidni quwwatan 'ala at-ta'ah wa as-sabr
duas.translation: O Allah, increase me in strength for obedience and patience

duas.bangla: اللهم اكتب لي العلم النافع والعمل الصالح
duas.transliteration: Allahumma uktub li al-'ilma an-nafi'a wa al-'amala as-salih
duas.translation: O Allah, decree for me beneficial knowledge and righteous deeds

duas.bangla: اللهم ارزقني رزقًا يكفيني ويبارك لي فيه
duas.transliteration: Allahumma arzuqni rizqan yakfini wa yubariku li fihi
duas.translation: O Allah, grant me provision that suffices me and bless it for me

duas.bangla: اللهم قوّ عزيمتي وارزقني النجاح
duas.transliteration: Allahumma qawwi 'azimatī wa arzuqni an-najah
duas.translation: O Allah, strengthen my resolve and grant me success

duas.bangla: اللهم اجعلني من أولي العقل والفهم
duas.transliteration: Allahumma ij'alni min ulil 'aql wal-fahm
duas.translation: O Allah, make me of those endowed with understanding and insight

duas.bangla: اللهم بارك لي فيما أعطيت واجعلني شاكرًا
duas.transliteration: Allahumma barik li fima a'tayt waj'alni shakiran
duas.translation: O Allah, bless for me what You have given and make me grateful

duas.bangla: اللهم اني اسألك زيادة في الرزق والبركة
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni as'aluka ziyadah fi ar-rizq wal-barakah
duas.translation: O Allah, I ask You for an increase in provision and blessing

duas.bangla: اللهم اجعلني مستعينًا بك ولا تجعلني مستغنيًا عنك
duas.transliteration: Allahumma ij'alni musta'inan bika wa la taj'alni mustaghniyan 'anka
duas.translation: O Allah, make me one who seeks help from You and not self-sufficient apart from You

duas.bangla: اللهم علمنا ما ينفعنا وعمّنّا
duas.transliteration: Allahumma 'allimna ma yanfa'una wa 'ammanna
duas.translation: O Allah, teach us what benefits us and protect us

duas.bangla: اللهم ارزقني سعة في رزقي وراحة في قلبي
duas.transliteration: Allahumma arzuqni si'ah fi rizqi wa rahat fi qalbi
duas.translation: O Allah, grant me spaciousness in my provision and peace in my heart

duas.bangla: اللهم زدني علما وألهمني الفهم
duas.transliteration: Allahumma zidni 'ilman wa alhimni al-fahm
duas.translation: O Allah, increase me in knowledge and inspire me with understanding

duas.bangla: اللهم اجعل رزقي من بركات السماء والأرض
duas.transliteration: Allahumma ij'al rizqi min barakat as-sama'i wal-ard
duas.translation: O Allah, make my provision from the blessings of the heavens and the earth

duas.bangla: اللهم علمنا ما ينفعنا ووفّقنا لطاعتك
duas.transliteration: Allahumma 'allimna ma yanfa'na wa waffiqna lita'atika
duas.translation: O Allah, teach us what benefits us and grant us success in obeying You

duas.bangla: اللهم ارزقني القوة والثبات على الخير
duas.transliteration: Allahumma arzuqni al-quwwa wa ath-thabat 'ala al-khair
duas.translation: O Allah, grant me strength and steadfastness to do good

duas.bangla: اللهم اجعل عملي سببًا في زيادة علمي
duas.transliteration: Allahumma ij'al 'amali sabab-an fi ziyadat 'ilmi
duas.translation: O Allah, make my work a cause for increasing my knowledge

duas.bangla: اللهم اغنني بحلالك وبارك لي فيه
duas.transliteration: Allahumma aghnini bihalalika wa barik li fihi
duas.translation: O Allah, make me self-sufficient with Your lawful provisions and bless them for me
